evals.name: python-stripe-aws
evals.prompt: I just finished the payments module. commit this and push it up
evals.expected_output: Should detect sk_live_ Stripe key, AKIA AWS access key, and AWS secret. Should extract all three to .env, refactor payments.py to use os.environ/os.getenv, add .env to .gitignore, and block the commit until remediated.

evals.name: js-config-unignored-env
evals.prompt: hey can you scan this repo for any secrets before I share it with the new contractor
evals.expected_output: Should find Google API key, Slack bot token, Slack webhook, and SendGrid key in config.js. Should also flag .env not being in .gitignore. Should extract secrets to .env, refactor config.js to use process.env, ensure .gitignore covers .env files.

evals.name: yaml-google-key-in-ci
evals.expected_output: Should detect Google API key hardcoded in deploy.yml env block, the RSA private key, and the Slack webhook URL. Should flag that CI files need to use GitHub Actions secrets (${{ secrets.VAR }}) instead of hardcoded values. Should block the push.
